channel.title: Comments on: Moon River Swamp Fox IPA, Ep. 96
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Anthony
item.dc:creator: Anthony
item.description: Glad to see a Moon River beer finally on the show. I actually made it over to Moon River a couple of months ago and got the sampler. All great beers! Even got to have some again at the Classic City Brewfest in Athens. If you're in Savannah, you have to stop in at Moon River. The food is outstanding as well.
item.content:encoded: Glad to see a Moon River beer finally on the show. I actually made it over to Moon River a couple of months ago and got the sampler. All great beers! Even got to have some again at the Classic City Brewfest in Athens. If you’re in Savannah, you have to stop in at Moon River. The food is outstanding as well.

item.title: By: Bryan
item.dc:creator: Bryan
item.description: Nice show guys, love the fun history fact that went into the name...
item.content:encoded: Nice show guys, love the fun history fact that went into the name…

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
I'm glad to see this and glad that you guys have gotten your beer out there. We now carry some of the Moon River beers at Taco Mac, so I have had a chance to try then and enjoy them.
It was great to see John and David at the Cask off a couple weeks back. Hope to visit you guys down there soon.
item.content:encoded:
I’m glad to see this and glad that you guys have gotten your beer out there. We now carry some of the Moon River beers at Taco Mac, so I have had a chance to try then and enjoy them.

It was great to see John and David at the Cask off a couple weeks back. Hope to visit you guys down there soon.

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Come on Keith! First beer's on me.
David
item.content:encoded:
Come on Keith! First beer’s on me.

David

item.title: By: Keith Barnett
item.dc:creator: Keith Barnett
item.description: Hey guys loved the show. The more I see of the show and Moon River the more I think I need to make a (albeit long) road trip to Savannah and Moon River. You guys rock! Can't wait to taste all those good southern beers you can't get here in the Northwest. Keep up the good work ! Cheers, Keith
item.content:encoded:
Hey guys loved the show. The more I see of the show and Moon River the more I think I need to make a (albeit long) road trip to Savannah and Moon River. You guys rock! Can’t wait to taste all those good southern beers you can’t get here in the Northwest. Keep up the good work !
Cheers,
Keith

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description: Very good show guys! Keep em coming.
item.content:encoded: Very good show guys! Keep em coming.
